case_title: INTRASTATE DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A CALIF CORP vs. GAYNELLE FERGUSON CE'LESTINE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTRASTATE DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A CALIF CORP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-30-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO-TEM MICHAEL BERG, MNORMAN, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAYNELLE FERGUSON CE'LESTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES NOT AT ISSUE - RESTORED TO PLTF $4,300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION TO BE STAYED PROVIDED DEFT PAYS $50/MO STARTING ON 10-5-95. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.
